title: thelymitra aemula
intro: Thelymitra aemula, also known as the common sun orchid, is a species of orchid native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in the treatment of fever and rheumatism, due to its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Thelymitra aemula include its ability to alleviate symptoms of fever and rheumatism, as well as its potential to act as an analgesic and antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Thelymitra aemula typically involve drying and processing the plant's roots and leaves into teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use.
